name: Alphinat Inc.
summary: Alphinat Inc. develops and markets software products that allow the implementation of self-service solutions and Web based workspace. The company offers smart digital government solutions; revenue-generating solutions for telcos; Bolt-on Amanda portal; dynamics customer portal; single sign-on and secure identity management; and low-code development platform. It also provides guided searches; and Lotus Notes migration applications. The company serves the public sector, as well as telecommunications, healthcare, and financial institutions in Canada, France, the United States, and internationally. Alphinat Inc. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
